auth.enter_the_6-digit_code_from_your_authent: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app or a recovery code.
auth.workspace_sign_in_description: Manage tickets, track SLAs, and collaborate with your team — all in one place.
auth.customer_portal_description: Customers can browse articles, submit requests, and track tickets.
auth.help_center_empty: Browse the help center or search once articles are published.
auth.forgot_password_description: Enter the email on your agent account and we will send a secure reset link.
auth.forgot_password_help: We will email a reset link if this address belongs to an agent or admin on your workspace.
auth.reset_password_description: Pick a strong password you have not used on this workspace before.
auth.reset_password_help: Your new password must meet the workspace security requirements.
